title: Fx_UpperLevel, Fy_UpperLevel, Fz_UpperLevel Properties
description: This sets or returns the value of the upper force threshold in the direction of translation in the specified axis.
notes:
XX_UpperLevel sets or returns the upper force threshold values for the specified axis in the direction of translation.

This is used for error checking and task completion conditions.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Trigger
 Fy_UpperLevel, Fz_UpperLevel Property

Fx_Enabled, Fy_Enabled, Fz_Enabled Property
examples:
Function SettingLevels FSet FT1.Enabled, True, False, False, False, False, False,
False, False FSet FT1.Fx_Polarity, FG_OUT FSet FT1.Fx_Levels, -50, 50 Trap 1, FT1 Call ForceError
Fend
